Video.summary: Dewight and Tiffany hit their breaking point when she learned he was cheating with her cousin Stacy! Pro cock fighter Johnny slept with Ashly and his girlfriend Ashley is steamed! Warren’s transsexual girlfriend has a big secret!
Video.title: Cheaters Confronted

Video.summary: Torrance admits to cheating on his girlfriend with a transsexual. Then, Heather wants her boyfriend’s ex Tramisha to stop interfering with their relationship.
Video.title: Sizzling Sex Secrets!

Video.summary: A woman thinks she is entitled to sleep with her mother's boyfriend since she is the sole breadwinner in the family.
Video.title: 999,999 Little Pieces

Video.summary: Reno has been dating Lavan for 6 months but has had a secret for the entirety of their relationship. Now Reno is ready to reveal that she is actually a woman, not a man.
Video.title: Honey...I'm A Woman

Video.summary: Freddie insists he wants to be with his wife and his days of hooking up with his ex-girlfriend are over; Carleeta devises a scheme she thinks will strengthen her bond with her sister; Shi's friend and boyfriend got to know each other better.
Video.title: Busted by Your Bestie

Video.summary: Mary Jane has a secret to reveal to George. For the past 6 months, she''s been cheating on him with a woman! Then, Tanya reveals to her husband that she’s in love with Sheri!
Video.title: Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover

Image.alt: Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover
Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover
Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover

Video.summary: Unemployed Sebastian has been badgering his girlfriend, Dee, for months to become a stripper and star in adult films. Later Steve tells his girlfriend that he's secretly been videotaping their sex sessions and broadcasting them over the Internet!
Video.title: My Secret Will Shock You!

Video.summary: Cousins Anthony and Brandon have been seeing each other in secret for the past year. Then, Chris is here to tell a secret to his on-again off-again girl Crystal.
Video.title: Gay Cousins In Love

Video.summary: Anthoney wants to be a father to his child, but he wants nothing to do with the one-night-stand mother; Deja had sex with her friend's boyfriend and now wants him for herself; Derrick and Haven have confessions to make.
Video.title: Dodging Divorce

Video.summary: Kim and Kristie are identical twins and Kristie is planning to marry Michael but there’s a catch. Later Louis has some explaining to do. His lover of 8 years has just informed his wife of their affair!
Video.title: My Twin Slept With My Man!

Image.alt: My Twin Slept With My Man!
My Twin Slept With My Man!
My Twin Slept With My Man!

Video.summary: Elisha is claiming to be pregnant with John's baby, but Elisha's friend Brittany claims that she made up the pregnancy to keep John from breaking up with her. Then, during her pregnancy, Linzy contracted an STD and believes that Alex gave it to her.
Video.title: She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap

Image.alt: She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap
She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap
She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap

Video.summary: Two years ago, Sharon gained custody of her daughter Megan and James’ child due to James’ abusive behavior. Megan admitted to him kicking her in the stomach while pregnant, but now says he is a changed man. Can they prove it to Sharon and Steve?
Video.title: Abused While Pregnant

Video.summary: Kelsey stayed with Alex after he cheated with 20 women, but he continued to cheat and became abusive after she became pregnant. Then, Kevin cheated on Tiffany with Zakiya, who is now stalking him and his family. Zakiya claims he fathered her baby!
Video.title: You Were Pregnant, He Abused You...Does He Deserve the DNA Results?

Image.alt: You Were Pregnant, He Abused You...Does He Deserve the DNA Results?
You Were Pregnant, He Abused You...Does He Deserve the DNA Results?
You Were Pregnant, He Abused You...Does He Deserve the DNA Results?

Video.summary: Steve revisits relationships that were riddled with all kinds of problems.
Video.title: Young Relationships Tested

Video.summary: Stephanie’s drug addiction led her to severely neglect and abuse their children. As Scott’s fiancée Amy has stepped in as a mother and Stephanie fails multiple drug tests, he doesn’t want her near the children, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!
Video.title: Mommy Hurt Me

Video.summary: Latonya says her wife told her she was raped and became pregnant with triplets, but doctors later said she was never pregnant.
Video.title: Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?

Image.alt: Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?
Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?
Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?

Video.summary: Melissa suspects that her long-distance boyfriend is not real, but is a false persona created by her best friend; a text message from a stranger informs Beverly that her husband is posting on numerous websites to cheat on her.
Video.title: Catfished!

Video.summary: After Cassarah became Tim’s live-in nanny, they began a sexual relationship. Her family is livid over the 26 year age gap and claims that he takes her to swingers’ parties. Can Steve help Cassarah leave this dysfunctional relationship?
Video.title: I Seduced My Teenage Nanny

Video.summary: Eric and Lisa are divorced and Eric is now dating Keri. Both Eric and Keri feel like Lisa is stalking them by sending him text messages and naked pictures. Then, Christopher has been unable to trust Olivia and thinks she may be cheating again.
Video.title: She's Stalking Us!

Video.summary: Mother stands up to her daughter in an attempt to protect her grand children.
Video.title: My Daughter is Unfit to Parent

Image.alt: My Daughter is Unfit to Parent
My Daughter is Unfit to Parent
My Daughter is Unfit to Parent

Video.summary: Teenage girls in a race to grow up begin having sex without considering the consequences.
Video.title: All She Wants To Do Is Have Sex

Image.alt: All She Wants To Do Is Have Sex
All She Wants To Do Is Have Sex
All She Wants To Do Is Have Sex

Video.summary: World renowned psychic Sylvia Browne helps investigate missing children.
Video.title: Psychic Solves Murder Mysteries

Video.summary: These guests live their lives as the opposite sex. Today they stand up for themselves against friends and family who do not accept who they are.
Video.title: You Don't Really Know Who I Am

Image.alt: You Don't Really Know Who I Am
You Don't Really Know Who I Am
You Don't Really Know Who I Am

Video.summary: Past transsexual guests return to the show to discuss new changes in their lives.
Video.title: Transsexual Updates

Video.summary: These unapologetic young women refuse to change their lifestyles despite having a child on the way.
Video.title: I'm Pregnant But I'm Still Partying

Image.alt: I'm Pregnant But I'm Still Partying
I'm Pregnant But I'm Still Partying
I'm Pregnant But I'm Still Partying

Video.summary: These young girls think that having a baby will improve their lives. Sally is here to convince them otherwise.
Video.title: My Teen's Desperate to Get Pregnant

Image.alt: My Teen's Desperate to Get Pregnant
My Teen's Desperate to Get Pregnant
My Teen's Desperate to Get Pregnant

Video.summary: Parents are fed up with their monster children and now they're demanding changes.
Video.title: I Want To Divorce My 11 Year Old!

Image.alt: I Want To Divorce My 11 Year Old!
I Want To Divorce My 11 Year Old!
I Want To Divorce My 11 Year Old!

Video.summary: Children confront their parents for actions that have ruined their lives.
Video.title: Mom, Dad … You Ruined My Life!

Image.alt: Mom, Dad … You Ruined My Life!
Mom, Dad … You Ruined My Life!
Mom, Dad … You Ruined My Life!

Video.summary: Why do these new moms feel it necessary to protect their babies from grandma?
Video.title: Mom, Stay Away from My Kids

Image.alt: Mom, Stay Away from My Kids
Mom, Stay Away from My Kids
Mom, Stay Away from My Kids

Video.summary: These men think they are gifts from God. They are about to be humbled.
Video.title: Stud or Dud?

Video.summary: Can Sally help these couples salvage their families? She calls in the experts to find out.
Video.title: Couples On The Verge of Divorce

Image.alt: Couples On The Verge of Divorce
Couples On The Verge of Divorce
Couples On The Verge of Divorce

Video.summary: These guests are all in for a surprise when their dreams come true.
Video.title: Dreams Come True!
